packageRules.description: Group Paperclip SDK + MCP server bumps. They ship in lockstep on the same date-based versioning scheme; one PR per release.
prBodyNotes: :rotating_light: **PAPERCLIP SDK BUMP — re-run Plan 02-01 smoke spike before merging.** Date-based versioning means we cannot trust SemVer compat guarantees. Run the snapshot-bookended install rehearsal against Countermoves (or BEAAA) and confirm: D-01 slot still renders, D-02 migrations still apply to plugin namespace, COEXIST-03 disable still preserves data. Update `runbook/REHEARSAL.md` with a new dated row before merging.

packageRules.description: React + react-dom must move together. Host pins React 19; never bump past major host pin.
Pin esbuild and TypeScript to host pins. Major bumps require host coordination.
Group all dev dependency patches into one weekly PR.
